_publications._publicationTitle: Immortalization and characterization of Schwann cell lines derived from NF1-associated cutaneous neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: Co-transduction of 14 primary cNF SC cultures with lentiviral vectors containing wild type hTERT and mCdk4 cDNA transgenes led to creation of cell lines that passage well beyond the primary cultures
details: Co-transduction with mCdk4 and hTERT led to successful immortalization in 14 out of 15 attempted co-transductions, enabling cells to passage well beyond primary cultures
